positive: A minimalist, abstract celestial landscape composition suitable for t-shirt print. Central focus is a stylized crescent moon nestled within wisps of cosmic nebula and stardust. The color palette should utilize deep midnight blue, vibrant sapphire, soft lavender, and brilliant gold accents. The style must be highly detailed, bioluminescent, and ethereal, featuring clean, crisp silhouettes against a dark background. Include geometric, crystalline patterns subtly emanating from the moon and extending outward, giving a sense of structured magic. The overall composition should be perfectly centered, embodying high contrast and striking depth. Artwork must be suitable for vectorization or screen printing, prioritizing clean lines and defined edges.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, signature, messy, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy, amateur drawing, graffiti, photographic, photorealism, low contrast
